title: Henriettella patrisiana
taxonomy: Henriettella patrisiana is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The classification of Henriettella patrisiana includes its kingdom as Plantae and its phylum as Magnoliophyta. Its class is Magnoliopsida, and its order is Myrtales. Within the family Melastomataceae, Henriettella patrisiana is classified as a genus within the subfamily Melastomatoideae.
